questions.question:
A Deployment named `subpath-api` in namespace `subpath-lab` is not starting with its intended ConfigMap-backed file mount.

Fix the workload so that:
- it mounts ConfigMap `app-config`
- the ConfigMap item path is `config/app.conf`
- the container mount path is `/etc/app/app.conf`
- the volume mount uses `subPath: config/app.conf`
- the mount stays read-only
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container can read `/etc/app/app.conf`

Do not replace the ConfigMap with an inline file. Fix the Deployment wiring.

verification.description: Deployment subpath-api uses the intended ConfigMap item path, subPath, mount path, and readOnly mount
Deployment subpath-api becomes Available after the mount wiring is repaired
The running container reads the expected ConfigMap-backed file at /etc/app/app.conf
